prose:
Method provenance and calculation details
Property: Atom-condensed Fukui functions (f⁺, f⁻, f⁰) and dual descriptor for ferrocene; headline value reported below is the largest electrophilic Fukui index (f⁺) corresponding to the most electrophilic site.
Level of theory: GFN2-xTB (semi-empirical tight-binding method; no Gaussian basis, no DFT functional).
Geometry provenance: single-point charge analysis performed directly on the user-supplied geometry in /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/ferrocene/ferrocene.xyz; no further optimization (GFN2-xTB//input-xyz).
Solvent / environment: gas phase (no implicit solvation model applied).
Charge and multiplicity: charge 0, multiplicity 1 (closed-shell singlet) for the neutral molecule; cation and anion states were computed at charge +1 (µ = 2) and –1 (µ = 2) for the finite-difference Fukui derivatives.
Software/backend: xTB 6.x backend via chemkit fukui-reactivity skill (exact version recorded in the live log; CLI invocation reproduced below).
Convergence & caveats: SCF cycles for neutral, cation, and anion all converged (integrity.status = "ok", trustworthy = true). The following engine warnings were issued (VERBATIM):
• name: fukui_charge_conservation_f+ | severity: warning | ok: true | detail: sum(f+) = 1.0000 (should be ~1.0; large drift suggests an N±1 state did not converge)
• name: fukui_charge_conservation_f- | severity: warning | ok: true | detail: sum(f-) = 1.0000 (should be ~1.0; large drift suggests an N±1 state did not converge)
• name: schema_header | severity: warning | ok: true | detail: common header present
No additional warnings were reported by the engine.
Live .out log: The calculation streamed live output to the caller’s working directory (exact path recorded by chemkit; available on request for inspection).

Key numerical results (GFN2-xTB Mulliken-based Fukui indices)
• Most electrophilic site: Fe (atom 11) with f⁺ = 0.22885456
• Most nucleophilic site: Fe (atom 11) with f⁻ = 0.25938191
• Dual descriptor on Fe: −0.030527354 (negative ⇒ Fe is overall nucleophilic)

CLI command (captured in result JSON)
/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py fukui --method xtb --charge 0 --multiplicity 1 /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/ferrocene/ferrocene.xyz --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmplvkttrie/live.json

All files (live log, result JSON, Fukui plot PNG) are located alongside the specified output path. Please let me know if you'd like any of them or further analysis.
